professorOnboarding.welcomeSubtitle: One PPT is all it takes — your first lecture clip is ready in about 12 minutes. We'll walk you through it in five steps.
professorOnboarding.checklistSubtitle: Complete these five steps and your students can start watching.
professorOnboarding.checklistComplete: 🎉 You've completed all five steps! Open the analytics report to follow learning trends.

stepProfile.title: Department & profile
stepProfile.desc: Add your school, department and position so the dashboard's semester context lights up.

stepCourse.title: Create your first course
stepCourse.desc: Group your lectures under a course (one per term).

stepUpload.title: Upload a PPT
stepUpload.desc: Drop in your existing slides — the AI extracts speaker notes and structure.

stepScript.title: Review & approve the AI script
stepScript.desc: Accept, reject or tweak each slide's AI-polished script, then start the render.

stepShare.title: Share the lecture with students
stepShare.desc: Distribute via QR code or short code — the lecture is now live for your class.

professorOnboarding.modalSubtitle: We use this for semester context on the dashboard and for student notification copy.
professorOnboarding.modalErrorBackend: Could not save your profile. Please try again in a moment.
professorOnboarding.modalDeferred: Saved locally — your profile will sync once the backend endpoint goes live.
professorOnboarding.tipDraftFirst: It's fine to leave a draft and polish later — nothing bills until you start the render.
professorOnboarding.tipQrFromPpt: Put the QR on your final slide so attendance and access take one tap from students.
professorOnboarding.tipPolicy: One lecture at a time is plenty — pace yourself.
professorOnboarding.openSampleHint: The sample demo opens in a new tab
